case_title: SHADAE MILNER VS. JACQUELYN JIA FU

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILNER, SHADAE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FU, JACQUELYN JIA $565.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $595.00, UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1946, PLAINTIFF WAS REQUIRED TO GIVE 10 DAYS' NOTICE OF TERMINATION AND IS LIABLE FOR $188 IN RENT. HOWEVER, UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5, THE COURT FINDS THE LANDLORD RETAINED THE DEPOSIT IN BAD FAITH AND AWARDS $188 IN STATUTORY DAMAGES. SEE CIV CODE SECTION 1950.5(L). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $565.00 FILED BY MILNER, SHADAE AS TO DEFENDANT FU, JACQUELYN JIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JUL-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FU, JACQUELYN JIA
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FU, JACQUELYN JIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF SHADAE MILNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACQUELYN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILNER, SHADAE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FU, JACQUELYN JIA $376.67 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $406.67, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO THE RETURN OF HER DEPOSIT LESS AN OFFSET FOR HER FAILURE TO GIVE 30 DAYS' NOTICE OF TERMINATION. DEFENDANT CANNOT REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO REPLACE HERSELF AS TENANT IN ORDER TO RECOVER HER DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF MAR-01-2019
DECLARATION OF SHOAIB J. AHMAD REGARDING SERVICE OF CLAIM

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JACQUELYN JIA FU IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO NOV-27-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF SHADAE MILNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACQUELYN JIA FU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
